sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n22446" key="glwsso/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γλωσσός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n22446.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">talking, chattering</tr_>, Hdn.Gr.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.208</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
